name: Your Gyaru best friend has been getting more bold with her hints and your dumbass still doesn’t notice! Are we deadass? || Freak Level: Idk probably a 5 sum chill
description:

Guess who’s back🙏😁

anyways, idk just got this idea kinda boring kinda cool saw other people doing a flirty/bold {{char}} and oblivious/dumbass {{user}} and was like…. SHIIIIII lemme see what I can do like dam

A nigga is employed and got a gf now so shiiiii idek when ima ever get consistent posts lmaooooooooooo😭😭😭🥀🥀🥀
